records.question: Which EPs by frogs flipping the fuck out have no offense as their group name, a group ID of 73243639, were released in 2016 or earlier, and have been snatched at most 8 times?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT torrents.id FROM torrents
WHERE torrents.releasetype = 'ep' AND torrents.totalsnatched <= 8 AND torrents.groupid = 73243639 AND torrents.groupyear <= 2016 AND torrents.groupname = 'no offense' AND torrents.artist = 'frogs flipping the fuck out'
records.pred_sql: SELECT id FROM torrents WHERE releaseType = 'ep' AND totalSnatched <= 8 AND groupId = 73243639 AND groupYear <= 2016 AND groupName = 'no offense' AND artist = 'frogs flipping the fuck out'

records.question: Which torrents by haftbefehl have the group name lass die affen aus dem zoo (drunken masters remix), group year at least 2014, group ID exactly 72860334, and exactly 2 total snatches?

SELECT torrents.id FROM torrents
WHERE torrents.groupname = 'lass die affen aus dem zoo (drunken masters remix)' AND torrents.groupyear >= 2014 AND torrents.totalsnatched = 2 AND torrents.groupid = 72860334 AND torrents.artist = 'haftbefehl'
records.pred_sql: SELECT id FROM torrents WHERE groupName = 'lass die affen aus dem zoo (drunken masters remix)' AND groupYear >= 2014 AND totalSnatched = 2 AND groupId = 72860334 AND artist = 'haftbefehl'

records.question: Which torrents have the groupname exactly equal to underground jazz file : piano?

SELECT torrents.id FROM torrents
WHERE torrents.groupname = 'underground jazz file : piano'

  T1.id
FROM torrents AS T1
WHERE
